properties.name: sloth.redis.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Redis starter auto configuration.

properties.name: sloth.redis.lock-wait-time
properties.description: Default lock wait time in seconds.

properties.name: sloth.redis.lock-lease-time
properties.description: Default lock lease time in seconds.

properties.name: sloth.redis.enable-type-info
properties.description: Whether to include type info in JSON serialization.

properties.name: sloth.redis.null-value-expire-seconds
properties.description: Expiration time for cached null values.
